name_en: 🔥 New version geometric bag, small size Nappa leather Featherlight Puzzle Handbag, original imported Nappa calfskin 💥 Outlines a rectangular shape with unique geometric lines. Soft and lightweight Nappa leather infuses a casual and lazy style into the handbag. *Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Removable and adjustable shoulder strap, decorated with a rotating buckle *Zipper closure, hinged zipper pull *One external zippered back pocket, one internal slip pocket *Removable, decorated with hidden pockets and balloon dice *Rectangular metal studs *💄 This small size version is made of soft Nappa calfskin *Small Puzzle can hold for example a large wallet 👛 All sizes of mobile phones 📱 and sunglasses 🕶 *Carried crossbody, shoulder, clutch or top handle *Removable 💙💚

Dimensions: 24CM~16CM~10CM
